introSection: Ocean Train Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at VinWonders in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

fullText:
Ocean Train Coaster was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at VinWonders in Phú Quốc, Kiên Giang, Vietnam.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.
